name: Number Ticker
description: An animated number counter that ticks up from zero to a target value with a smooth rolling digit animation, perfect for statistics and metrics.
whenToUse: Use for statistics sections, dashboards, pricing numbers, or any numeric value that should animate into view to draw attention.

props.name: value
props.description: The target number to animate to

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay before animation starts in seconds

props.name: decimalPlaces
props.description: Number of decimal places to show
